category_description: Initial institutional support and active guidance offered to the newcomer during organizational socialization
relational_or_cognitive_mechanism: Construction of relational ties and perceived organizational support

category_description: Quality of direct interaction with the immediate supervisor including accessibility involvement and support in role clarification
Level of collaboration and welcome from the work group as a facilitator of belonging and early integration
Clarity delimitation and operational understanding of tasks goals and responsibilities associated with the role
Subjective perception of the temporal extension of the onboarding programme and its adequacy for assimilation
Accessibility and structuring of critical information required for autonomous performance at entry
Degree of operational independence perceived or required at entry according to role demands and organizational culture
relational_or_cognitive_mechanism: Self-directed adjustment and agency in role enactment

category_description: Capacity for orientation and effective navigation through internal digital platforms used for knowledge and self-training
Presence of explicit references to values principles and normative frameworks guiding organizational conduct
relational_or_cognitive_mechanism: Symbolic congruence between individual and organizational values

category_description: Level of congruence between pre-entry expectations and the reality experienced during onboarding
relational_or_cognitive_mechanism: Continuous evaluation of congruence between expectations and lived experience

category_description: Assignment and active role of formal or informal reference figures facilitating organizational and emotional learning
relational_or_cognitive_mechanism: Reference-person mediation of learning and emotional adjustment

category_description: Availability understanding and functionality of technical and digital instruments for effective performance
Horizontal or vertical interactions with other functional areas as part of structural integration
Quality timeliness and bidirectionality of formal and informal institutional communication channels
Global affective evaluation of onboarding and its perceived impact on motivation and continuity
relational_or_cognitive_mechanism: Affective consolidation of the organizational bond

category_description: Perception of absence of structure improvisation or incoherence in the onboarding planning
relational_or_cognitive_mechanism: Disruption of expected coherence and emergence of uncertainty

category_description: Sense of identification with the organization its mission and members during the first stages of the employment relationship
relational_or_cognitive_mechanism: Construction of insider status and organizational identification

category_description: Perception of operational or emotional overload during the first days associated with inadequate onboarding progression
relational_or_cognitive_mechanism: Overload generated by excessive or poorly sequenced information

category_description: Physical and digital conditions of the work environment affecting welcome accessibility and initial well-being
Explicit disposition to recommend the onboarding process as an indicator of perceived quality
